findings.summary: No undo mechanism after session deletion
findings.details: Deleting a session is permanent with no undo toast, trash, or 'Recently Deleted' section. The two-step inline confirmation is the only safeguard.

findings.summary: Context menu interaction crashes the app
findings.details: Clicking the three-dot menu on a session item sometimes triggers the ErrorBoundary ('Something went wrong'). Related to the known conversation-open crash.
